name: deep-review
description: Multi-dimensional PR review orchestrator. Dispatches parallel reviewers (spec-conformance, correctness, test-quality, docs-sync, robustness, security, ux, performance, structure, code-quality, skill-plugin-quality) and synthesizes findings into an actionable punch list. Supports project-level custom reviewers via `docs/rules/review/` and ships a `reviewer-creator` skill for scaffolding them.
